sidepanel.heading: Customize sidepanel cards
sidepanel.description: Customize the layout and visibility of cards in the sidepanel. This section is only available on large screen devices such as tablets and desktops.
sidepanel.resetHelp: Restore the recommended card order and visibility.

welcome.title: User Switcher
welcome.description: Allows admins and managers to view tasks as different users.

smartInsights.title: Smart Insights
smartInsights.description: Shows quick actions based on your current tasks.

assignees.title: Tasks by Assignee
assignees.description: Groups tasks by the person they are assigned to.

calendar.title: Calendar View
calendar.description: Shows tasks in a calendar layout.

activities.title: Recent Activities
activities.description: Shows recent task completions and other activity.

weeklyGoals.title: Weekly Goals
weeklyGoals.description: Shows weekly progress and completion statistics for your circle.

sidepanel.title: Sidepanel Customization

theme.description: Choose how the site looks to you. Select a single theme, or sync with your system and automatically switch between day and night themes.
theme.title: Theme preferences

profile.description: Update your display name and profile photo.
profile.photoUpdatedMessage: Your profile photo has been updated successfully!
profile.uploadFailedMessage: Failed to upload your photo. Please try again.
profile.profileUpdatedMessage: Your profile information has been saved successfully!
profile.updateFailedMessage: Unable to update your profile. Please check your connection and try again.
profile.title: Profile Settings

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used throughout the app. This preference is saved on this device.

childAccounts.title: Managed Accounts
childAccounts.parentOnly: Only primary users can manage sub accounts.
childAccounts.description: Manage sub accounts. Sub account users can log in and complete assigned tasks.
childAccounts.planWarning: Sub accounts are limited to 1 on the Free plan. Upgrade to Plus to have up to 5 sub accounts.
childAccounts.emptyDescription: Create sub accounts so team members can log in and complete their assigned tasks.
childAccounts.bulletOne: Managed accounts are created by the primary user and can be deleted or have their password reset by that user.
childAccounts.bulletTwo: Sub accounts can log in with their own username and password.
childAccounts.bulletThree: Managed accounts can complete tasks but have limited administrative permissions.
childAccounts.bulletFour: Managed accounts are automatically added to your circle.
childAccounts.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the child account "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Configure advanced features like webhooks and real-time updates for enhanced productivity.
advanced.webhookDescription: Webhooks let you send real-time notifications to other services when events happen in your Circle. Configure a webhook URL to receive updates.
advanced.webhookPlanWarning: Webhook notifications are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to receive real-time updates via webhooks.
advanced.enableWebhookHelper: Enable webhook notifications for tasks and things updates.
advanced.realtimeSummary: Get instant notifications when tasks are updated
advanced.realtimeUnavailable: Real-time updates are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to receive instant notifications when tasks are updated.
advanced.realtimeDisabled: Real-time updates are disabled. Enable them to see live changes when you or other circle members complete, skip, or modify tasks.
advanced.realtimeConnected: Real-time updates are working. You'll see live changes when you or other circle members complete, skip, or modify tasks.
advanced.realtimeError: Real-time updates are enabled but not working: {{error}}
advanced.realtimeEnabledNotConnected: Real-time updates are enabled but not currently connected.
advanced.sseSummary: Get instant notifications via Server-Sent Events
advanced.sseUnavailable: Real-time updates (SSE) are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to receive instant notifications when chores are updated.
advanced.sseDisabled: Real-time updates (SSE) are disabled. Enable to see live changes when you or other circle members complete, skip, or modify chores.
advanced.sseConnected: Real-time updates (SSE) are working. You'll see live changes when you or other circle members complete, skip, or modify chores.
advanced.sseError: Real-time updates (SSE) are enabled but not working: {{error}}
advanced.sseEnabledNotConnected: Real-time updates (SSE) are enabled but not currently connected.

connection.tooltipJoinCircle: Real-time updates (SSE): {{status}} - Join a circle to enable real-time updates

advanced.realtimeSectionDescription: Configure how you receive live updates when tasks and activities change in your circle.

account.description: Change your account settings, subscription status, or password.
account.activePlan: You are currently subscribed to the Plus plan. Your subscription will renew on {{date}}.
account.cancelledPlan: You have cancelled your subscription. Your account will be downgraded to the Free plan on {{date}}.
account.freePlan: You are currently on the Free plan. Upgrade to the Plus plan to unlock more features.
account.dangerDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
account.purchaseSuccess: Purchase successful! Please restart the app to access Plus features.
account.purchaseNetwork: Store connection issue. Please check your network and try again.
account.purchaseNotAllowed: Purchases are not allowed on this device. Please check your device restrictions.
account.purchaseUnavailable: This subscription is not available. Please try again later.
account.purchaseProcessed: This purchase has already been processed. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
account.purchaseReceiptMissing: Purchase receipt missing. Please try purchasing again.
account.purchasePending: Payment is pending approval. You will receive access once approved.
account.purchaseFailed: Purchase failed: {{message}}. Please try again or contact support.

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.createDescription: Create an encrypted backup of your data. This includes your chores, history, settings, and optionally uploaded files.
backup.encryptionKeyHint: Keep this key safe. You'll need it to restore your backup.
backup.restored: Backup restored successfully. Please refresh the page.
backup.restoreWarning: Restoring a backup will replace all your current data. This action cannot be undone.
backup.restoreKeyPlaceholder: Enter the encryption key used for this backup

subscription.title: Upgrade to Plus
subscription.footer: Cancel anytime. No hidden fees. Secure payment powered by Stripe.
subscription.errorMessage: Failed to start subscription process. Please try again.

features.richText: Rich text descriptions with image uploads

nativeCancel.title: Cancel Subscription
nativeCancel.description: To cancel your subscription, follow the instructions for your platform. You should cancel through the same platform you used to subscribe.

iosSteps.1: 1. Open the Settings app on your device
iosSteps.2: 2. Tap your name at the top of the screen

nativeCancel.iosNote: If you subscribed through iOS and are using the web or desktop version, you must cancel through iOS Settings as described above.

androidSteps.1: 1. Open the Google Play Store app
androidSteps.2: 2. Tap the profile icon in the top right

nativeCancel.androidNote: If you subscribed through Google Play and are using the web or desktop version, you must cancel through Google Play as described above.
nativeCancel.webDescription: If you originally subscribed through our website or desktop app, you can cancel your subscription from the Account Settings section on our website using a web browser.
nativeCancel.webImportant: You must cancel your subscription through the same platform where you originally subscribed. If you subscribed through the iOS App Store or Google Play Store, you must cancel through that original platform.
nativeCancel.billingPeriod: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period.
nativeCancel.cancelFromStore: I'll cancel from my app store
nativeCancel.cancelDesktopNow: I subscribed via desktop - Cancel now

apiTokensPage.heading: Access Token
apiTokensPage.description: Create tokens to use with the API for updating things, tasks, or chores.
apiTokensPage.plusDescription: API tokens are not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to generate API tokens for integrations and automation.
apiTokensPage.removeTokenConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}?
apiTokensPage.namePrompt: Give a name for your new token, something to remember it by.

mfaPage.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account with multi-factor authentication (MFA). When enabled, you'll need a verification code from your authenticator app in addition to your password when signing in.
mfaPage.title: Two-Factor Authentication
mfaPage.disabled: Secure your account with an authenticator app
mfaPage.step1: Step 1: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
mfaPage.addedToApp: I've added the account to my app
mfaPage.step2: Step 2: Enter the 6-digit verification code from your authenticator app
mfaPage.backupSaveTitle: Save these backup codes in a safe place
mfaPage.backupSaveDescription: You can use these codes to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once.
mfaPage.disableWarning: Disabling MFA will make your account less secure. Are you sure you want to continue?
mfaPage.disablePrompt: Enter a verification code from your authenticator app to confirm:
mfaPage.backupCodesWarning: Your previous backup codes are now invalid. Save these new codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
mfaPage.invalidResponse: Invalid response from server. Missing QR code or secret.
mfaPage.endpointMissing: MFA setup endpoint not found. This feature may not be available yet.
mfaPage.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
mfaPage.setupFailed: Failed to set up MFA ({{status}}). Please try again.
mfaPage.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
mfaPage.invalidCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
mfaPage.confirmFailed: Failed to confirm MFA. Please try again.
mfaPage.disableFailed: Failed to disable MFA. Please try again.
mfaPage.backupRegenerated: New backup codes have been generated!
mfaPage.regenerateFailed: Failed to regenerate backup codes. Please try again.

developer.title: Developer Settings
developer.description: View technical information about your authentication tokens, notifications, and session state for debugging.
developer.refreshTokenCookie: Refresh tokens are managed via HTTP-only cookies on web platform.

storage.title: Storage Settings
storage.serverUsageDescription: This is the storage used by your account on our servers, such as files, images, and uploaded data.
storage.basicPlanUnavailable: Server storage is not available in the Basic plan. Upgrade to Plus to track your server storage usage.
storage.offlineModeDescription: Allows the app to work offline by caching data locally. This is experimental and may cause slowness. If you experience performance issues, turn this off.
storage.offlineModeWarning: Offline mode is enabled. If you experience slowness, disable this setting.
storage.localStorageDescription: This is data stored locally for faster access and offline use. Clearing it will not affect your server data, but may log you out or remove offline tasks.
storage.clearAllMessage: Are you sure you want to clear your local storage and cache? This will remove all your data from this browser and require login.
storage.clearAllButton: Clear All Local Storage and Cache
storage.clearOfflineMessage: Are you sure you want to clear only the offline cache and tasks?
storage.clearOfflineButton: Clear Offline Cache and Offline Tasks
storage.appPreferencesDescription: These preferences are stored locally on your device. Clearing them will reset app-specific settings and may log you out, but will not affect your server data.
storage.clearPreferencesMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all app preferences? This will reset your app settings and may require you to log in again.

circlePage.description: Your account is automatically connected to a Circle when you create or join one. Invite friends with the Circle code or join link below. You'll see join requests here as well.
circlePage.joinPrompt: Want to join someone else's Circle? Ask them for their unique Circle code or join link. Enter the code below to join their Circle.
circlePage.leaveConfirm: Are you sure you want to leave your circle?
circlePage.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from your circle?
circlePage.acceptConfirm: Are you sure you want to accept {{name}} (username: {{username}}) into your circle?
circlePage.joinSuccess: Joined circle successfully, wait for the circle owner to accept your request.
circlePage.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this circle

roleDescriptions.member: Just a regular member of the circle
roleDescriptions.manager: Can impersonate users and perform actions on their behalf

passwordChange.title: Change Password
passwordChange.min: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordChange.max: Password must be less than 64 characters

userDeletion.title: Delete Account
userDeletion.warningIntro: This action cannot be undone. Deleting your account will permanently remove:

items.profile: Your user profile and authentication data
items.chores: All your chores, chore history, and time tracking sessions
items.tokens: API tokens, MFA sessions, and password reset tokens

userDeletion.transferIntro: You own circles that require ownership transfer before deletion. Please select new owners:
userDeletion.finalPrompt: Please enter your password and type DELETE to confirm account deletion.
userDeletion.finalHint: On successful deletion, you will be logged out and redirected to the login page.
userDeletion.confirmDelete: Please enter your password and type DELETE to confirm

localization.rtlNotice: This language uses right-to-left (RTL) text direction
localization.title: Localization
localization.description: Customize language, date format, and regional preferences for your account.
localization.dateFormatDescription: Choose how dates should be displayed throughout the application
localization.firstDayOfWeekDescription: Select which day starts your week

circleSettings.title: Circle settings
circleSettings.description: Your account is automatically connected to a Circle when you create or join one. Easily invite friends by sharing the unique Circle code or link below. You'll receive a notification below when someone requests to join your Circle. If you'd like to leave, simply hit the 'Leave Circle' button.
circleSettings.leaveConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to leave this circle?
circleSettings.webhookDescription: Enter a webhook URL to receive notifications for circle events

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.dangerZoneDescription: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
